Class MockSceneService

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.service.mock.MockSceneService
All Implemented Interfaces:
SceneService
public final class MockSceneService extends Object implements SceneService
Mock Scene Service providing smart scene management functionality.

    Method

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static MockSceneService getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of the mock scene service.
      Returns:
      singleton MockSceneService instance

    • resetForTesting

      public static void resetForTesting()
      Resets the singleton for unit testing. Must NOT be called from production code.

    • getScenes

      public javafx.collections.ObservableList<Scene> getScenes()
      Gets all scenes.
      Specified by:
      getScenes in interface SceneService
      Returns:
      observable list of scenes

    • addScene

      public Scene addScene(String name, String description)
      Adds a new scene.
      Specified by:
      addScene in interface SceneService
      Parameters:
      name - display name of the scene
      description - summary of the scene behavior
      Returns:
      created scene instance

    • addScene

      public Scene addScene(String name, String description, List<String> deviceStates)
      Adds a new scene with explicit device states.
      Specified by:
      addScene in interface SceneService
      Parameters:
      name - display name of the scene
      description - summary of the scene behavior
      deviceStates - configured device-state definitions
      Returns:
      created scene instance

    • activateScene

      public boolean activateScene(String sceneId)
      Activates a scene.
      Specified by:
      activateScene in interface SceneService
      Parameters:
      sceneId - identifier of the scene to activate
      Returns:
      true when the scene exists and activation ran, otherwise false

    • updateScene

      public boolean updateScene(String sceneId, String name, String description)
      Updates a scene.
      Specified by:
      updateScene in interface SceneService
      Parameters:
      sceneId - identifier of the scene to update
      name - updated scene name
      description - updated scene description
      Returns:
      true when the scene exists and was updated, otherwise false

    • updateScene

      public boolean updateScene(String sceneId, String name, String description, List<String> deviceStates)
      Updates a scene and replaces its configured device states.
      Specified by:
      updateScene in interface SceneService
      Parameters:
      sceneId - identifier of the scene to update
      name - updated scene name
      description - updated scene description
      deviceStates - replacement device-state definitions
      Returns:
      true when the scene exists and was updated, otherwise false

    • deleteScene

      public boolean deleteScene(String sceneId)
      Deletes a scene.
      Specified by:
      deleteScene in interface SceneService
      Parameters:
      sceneId - identifier of the scene to delete
      Returns:
      true when the scene existed and was removed, otherwise false
